name: Bat Room
description: You are in a small room which has doors only to the east and south. In the corner of the room on the ceiling is a large vampire bat who is obviously deranged and holding his nose. There is an exquisite jade figurine here.

npcs.name: Vampire Bat
npcs.description: A large vampire bat hangs from the ceiling in the corner of the room. It appears deranged and is holding its nose.
